metadata.notice: These records are transparent crop-geometry display rectifications. They are not landmark-validated ground registrations and are excluded from alignment analysis.

placements.title: Hörhausen 2009 open-license aerial crop-geometry placement
placements.corner_basis: Four crop-geometry extremities in the oblique aerial were rectified to the documented 120 metre formation envelope. The source-row direction was aligned to the approximately 130 degree true field-row direction visible in current reference imagery. Full-frame corners are extrapolated from that display transform.
placements.reference_imagery: Esri World Imagery plus Wikimedia Commons geotags
placements.site_text: The 2009-07-27 aerial and 2009-07-25 ground photograph document the Hörhausen formation discovered on 2009-07-12. Their geotags constrain the same Tägermoos field vicinity; the later aerial states that the formation was 15 days old.

source_report_controls.reported_place: Tägermoos between Steckborn and Hörhausen, Thurgau, Switzerland

placements.review_basis: Same-event later documentation, two nearby open-license geotags, a documented 120 metre size, and field-row orientation constrain a useful display placement without claiming persistent-landmark validation.
placements.quality_limitations: The source frame is oblique and close-cropped, the two geotags may represent photographer or camera positions rather than surveyed formation control, no 2009 orthophoto was available in the public workflow, and zero independent persistent-landmark checkpoints validate the projected corners.
placements.quality_disclosure: Provisional crop-geometry rectification, not an exact landmark georegistration. Event identity and field vicinity are well supported; the precise center, rotation, scale, and four projected corners remain uncertain and are excluded from alignment calculations.
placements.notes: The CC BY 2.0 aerial loads from Wikimedia Commons only after explicit user action. The related ground photograph is linked in the report image archive. This display placement cannot originate or validate an alignment ray.

quality_gate.reason: crop geometry and approximate geotags are not independent persistent ground control
